title: Better than ever - Tasting: Pinot varieties
summary: With over 1,700 wines currently being tasted, it is clear that the variety and quality of white and red wines from Pinot varieties has probably never been as high as it is today. Even difficult vintages do little to change this.
content: With over 1,700 wines currently being tasted, it is clear that the variety and quality of white and red wines from Pinot varieties has probably never been as high as it is today. Even difficult vintages do little to change this.

title: Wine and catering tents from Pro-Tent - Advertisement
summary: Whether wine tasting as a special event, a canopy for the outdoor area of a wine tavern or a prestigious stand at a wine festival—winegrowers and winemakers rely on Pro-Tent's wine and catering tents. Especially for temporary stands, they benefit from the quick assembly and dismantling and the convenient transport system.
content: Whether wine tasting as a special event, a canopy for the outdoor area of a wine tavern or a prestigious stand at a wine festival—winegrowers and winemakers rely on Pro-Tent's wine and catering tents. Especially for temporary stands, they benefit from the quick assembly and dismantling and the convenient transport system.

title: "I like wines that I don't immediately fall in love with" - Interview: Ilija Trojanow
summary: The author Ilija Trojanow talks about his fascination with wine, the importance of inebriation, the connection between winemakers and writers—and why wine is only good when it makes a conversation possible.
content: The author Ilija Trojanow talks about his fascination with wine, the importance of inebriation, the connection between winemakers and writers—and why wine is only good when it makes a conversation possible.

title: These wines make you happy! - The half-year winners in all categories
summary: In view of the news situation, the only thing that helps is to have a good time. Perhaps with a great Riesling, Burgundy, or sparkling wine? With our selection of the best wines from the past few months, the sun will shine even on hard days. We promise!
content: In view of the news situation, the only thing that helps is to have a good time. Perhaps with a great Riesling, Burgundy, or sparkling wine? With our selection of the best wines from the past few months, the sun will shine even on hard days. We promise!

title: "There are no corked bottles hanging on vines" - Interview: Florian Weingart
summary: Winemaker Florian Weingart from Spay (Mittelrhein) criticises the new German classification system, which is based on the VDP system. In this interview, he explains why he considers the new rules to be technically incorrect and not equal for all wineries.
content: Winemaker Florian Weingart from Spay (Mittelrhein) criticises the new German classification system, which is based on the VDP system. In this interview, he explains why he considers the new rules to be technically incorrect and not equal for all wineries.

title: Our price enjoyment winners of the past months - Tasting: The best wines for little money
summary: How big is your budget for a bottle of wine? A maximum of ten euros, up to 15 or 20 euros? We make it easy for you and present our favourites for spring. In all three price categories, in red, rosé and white, dry and sweet, plus sparkling wines up to 25 euros.
content: How big is your budget for a bottle of wine? A maximum of ten euros, up to 15 or 20 euros? We make it easy for you and present our favourites for spring. In all three price categories, in red, rosé and white, dry and sweet, plus sparkling wines up to 25 euros.

title: Everything is real—except the wine - Recognising counterfeit wine
summary: There is a kind of arms race between fraudsters and traders: even professionals find it difficult to detect counterfeit wines today. But they are fighting back with high-tech tools and new methods of detection.
content: There is a kind of arms race between fraudsters and traders: even professionals find it difficult to detect counterfeit wines today. But they are fighting back with high-tech tools and new methods of detection.

title: Golden Grape Awards: These are the winners 2025/2026 - Award ceremony at the Eurovino in Karlsruhe
summary: In the GOLDEN GRAPE AWARDS competitions for Silvaner, Sauvignon Blanc, Riesling, Pinot varieties, and Blaufränkisch, we tasted over 4,400 wines from 994 wineries. Here are the winners! #goldengrapeawards #weinplus
content: In the GOLDEN GRAPE AWARDS competitions for Silvaner, Sauvignon Blanc, Riesling, Pinot varieties, and Blaufränkisch, we tasted over 4,400 wines from 994 wineries. Here are the winners! #goldengrapeawards #weinplus

title: A tough year with a good ending - Tasting: Riesling 2024
summary: First came the frost, then the rain—not an easy year for German winegrowers. But what they made of it is amazing: the Riesling wines are often excellent, as Marcus Hofschuster and Kim Schreiber discovered during their big tasting.
content: First came the frost, then the rain—not an easy year for German winegrowers. But what they made of it is amazing: the Riesling wines are often excellent, as Marcus Hofschuster and Kim Schreiber discovered during their big tasting.

title: Euphoria with a few shadows - Impressions from Wine Paris
summary: Wine Paris has had a meteoric rise: barely known in 2020, it is at the top in 2026. Never before has there been such a large wine fair in France—and never has such euphoria been felt at a trade fair. Crisis? Not in Paris.
content: Wine Paris has had a meteoric rise: barely known in 2020, it is at the top in 2026. Never before has there been such a large wine fair in France—and never has such euphoria been felt at a trade fair. Crisis? Not in Paris.
